Oman's First:
Taste MLS Dry-
Aged Perfection
ecom-dry-aged-page.textcontent_n3wsotszyan_html:
Introducing Dry-Aged meat for the first time
in Oman, where meat ages with flavor.
ecom-dry-aged-page.headingtext_b4xqfio4ca8_html: For special requests or any customization in your meat, please mention in the notes in the cart.
ecom-dry-aged-page.text0_9f89nzm7qjn_html: Dry Aging intensifies the meat's natural falvours, resulting in a richer and more complex taste
ecom-dry-aged-page.text1_9f89nzm7qjn_html: the aging process naturally tenderizes the meat, making it incredibly juicy and easy to cut.
ecom-dry-aged-page.text2_9f89nzm7qjn_html: Dry-aged meat can be prepared in various ways, from grilling and roasting to sous-vide cooking, allowing for diverse culinary experiences
ecom-dry-aged-page.textcontent_3adlkuwillf_html: At MLS, we're taking this timeless tradition to the next level, offering you a taste like no other.
ecom-dry-aged-page.timeline_content0_0bz7cskcb2ld_html: In the first week, dry-aged meat begins its transformation.
ecom-dry-aged-page.timeline_content1_0bz7cskcb2ld_html: Flavors intensify, with subtle nuttiness and sweetness.
ecom-dry-aged-page.timeline_content2_0bz7cskcb2ld_html: Tender, intense, and a spectrum of flavors.
ecom-dry-aged-page.timeline_content3_0bz7cskcb2ld_html: Meat is ready - incredibly tender, with intense beefiness.
ecom-dry-aged-page.timeline_content0_k4jelguvqc_html: In the first week, dry-aged meat begins its transformation, like the opening chapter of a story.
ecom-dry-aged-page.timeline_content1_k4jelguvqc_html: By the second week, the plot thickens. Flavors intensify, with subtle nuttiness and sweetness.
ecom-dry-aged-page.timeline_content2_k4jelguvqc_html: Around the third week, the story hits its peak. Tender, intense, and a spectrum of flavors.
ecom-dry-aged-page.timeline_content3_k4jelguvqc_html: In the fourth week, the meat reaches its climax, incredibly tender, with intense beefiness.
ecom-dry-aged-page.textcontent_1xrvlkmr91t_html: We carefully select our wide variety of high-quality meats and age them for 30 - 90 days to develop peak flavor and buttery texture, bringing  you a true farm-to-table experience unlike any others. Shop now!

ecom-our-story-new-page.textcontent_ej7ntpzhd5l_html: We not only make the country’s finest red meat, but through sustainable job creation, we empower our farmers and butchers to build a brighter future. Our strategy is to focus first on identifying consumer needs, then work with our farmers to grow animals and apply our expertise to meet those needs.
ecom-our-story-new-page.textcontent_g2cayht0fw_html: We come from a family of butchers, passionate about red meat, and livestock. A family business started from a butcher shop in Ibra, Oman, 1977- today we exist to nourish people with nature's finest red meat.
ecom-our-story-new-page.timeline_title0_9s20aktxhhp_html: THE FATHER Abdul Majid arrived in Oman.
ecom-our-story-new-page.timeline_content0_9s20aktxhhp_html: Ibra, Al Sharqiya- created first meat store
ecom-our-story-new-page.textcontent_v4ygoiib4wm_html: For decades, we are maintaining the strict standards to deliver humanely raised red meat, 100% grass-fed and grain-fed. we are nourishing people with nature's finest red meat. We provide consumers, who want quality and experiences from their food, with an entire range of red meat products including grain-fed, hormone-free and antibiotic-free.
ecom-our-story-new-page.textcontent_alt95xz3row_html: We believe business not only has the ability to be a part of environmental solutions, but also a moral responsibility to address them.We are the first carbon neutral company in Oman. MLS has committed to the United Nations’ Climate Neutral Now initiative – estimating, reducing and compensating its greenhouse gas emissions in an effort to make no net release into the atmosphere.

ecom-our-story-page.headingtext_21b5gd5xw24_html: A family business, a family of butchers, this is the MLS story
ecom-our-story-page.textcontent_3nlvekemwyx_html: Founded in 2008, MLS is one of Oman's leading procurers, processors, and marketers of premium quality red meat.
ecom-our-story-page.headingtext_mgaxfv5uwz9_html: WE EXIST TO NOURISH PEOPLE WITH NATURE'S FINEST RED MEAT.
ecom-our-story-page.headingtext_rqm4dre8k5e_html: WE EXIST TO NOURISH PEOPLE WITH NATURE'S FINEST RED MEAT.
ecom-our-story-page.headingtext_5wlpgh77gt5_html: WE EXIST TO NOURISH PEOPLE WITH NATURE'S FINEST RED MEAT.
ecom-our-story-page.headingtext_2bf54vyxcm2_html: WE EXIST TO NOURISH PEOPLE WITH NATURE'S FINEST RED MEAT.
ecom-our-story-page.headingtext_cx9c8vlewgi_html: <font color="#ffffff">Expanding from Oman to UAE: </font><font color="#db888b">A Butchery Legacy</font>
ecom-our-story-page.textcontent_bk801r4q21h_html: <font color="#ffffff">MLS is more than just a meat provider; it's a family tradition rooted in butchery expertise for over 45 years. Started in Oman, we're excited to extend our legacy to the UAE. With decades of experience behind us, we're dedicated to delivering top-quality meat products to your doorstep in Dubai within the same day.</font>
ecom-our-story-page.textcontent_qhl3mk8ixmf_html: Our story began with Abdul Majid, who laid the foundation for our butchery business in Oman in 1977. His son, Naveed Ahmed, continued the tradition by founding Muscat Livestock in 2008, marking the beginning of a new chapter. Despite challenges like COVID-19, we adapted and thrived, transforming into a successful e-commerce platform in Oman. Now, under the guidance of brothers Naveed & Nadeem Ahmed, we're expanding into the UAE, with over 15 MLS Gourmet stores in Oman paving the way.

ecom-our-story-page.textcontent_2dy2g3m0or1_html: At MLS, we're committed to delivering the best. Our goal is simple: to provide ethically sourced, high-quality red meat products. Whether it's hormone-free, antibiotic-free, or grain-fed, we ensure that every product reflects our values of sustainability and excellence. Join us as we bring the taste of tradition to the Oman, one cut at a time.
